rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use implementation annexes only for implementation-level bindings
Declare constants and equations in the appropriate annex scope
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees, avoiding implementation-only paths in type annexes
Avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables; use exposed ports or constants instead
Use visible identifiers when possible to maintain contract clarity
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;`
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types like integer or boolean
